sources.title: Microsoft Azure Blog - Agentic AI Posts
observedSignals: Multiple recent posts on agentic AI and enterprise scaling
References to governance, compliance, and responsible AI patterns

sources.title: Microsoft Learn - Responsible AI and Governance
observedSignals: Published patterns for AI governance and audit logging
Reference frameworks for decision authority and compliance

sources.title: Microsoft DevBlogs - AI and Security
observedSignals: Emerging patterns for agentic application governance
Security and compliance considerations for autonomous systems

claims.claim: No published governance framework for enterprise agentic AI exists at scale.
Agent governance requires audit logging of decision reasoning, not just input/output.
Least-privilege scoping and human escalation thresholds are critical for compliant agents.

openQuestions: Needs verification: specific audit logging standards for agent decision-making in regulated industries.
Needs verification: cross-company benchmarks for escalation thresholds and false-positive rates in agent governance implementations.
complianceNotes: No internal Microsoft governance examples used; all references are public patterns.
Framework design is based on general principles, not internal tooling or roadmaps.
Include personal-view disclaimer for enterprise context.
